class.summary: Represents a complex number with arbitrary precision real and imaginary parts.

Zero.summary: Gets a complex number that represents zero (0 + 0i).

constructor_default.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with zero value.

constructor.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified real and imaginary parts.
constructor.param: The real part of the complex number.
The imaginary part of the complex number.

ToString.summary: Returns a string representation of the complex number.

Equals.summary: Determines whether the specified object is equal to the current complex number.
Equals.returns: true if the objects are equal; otherwise, false.

GetHashCode.summary: Returns the hash code for the current complex number.
GetHashCode.returns: A hash code based on the real and imaginary parts.

Real.summary: Gets or sets the real part of the complex number.

Imaginary.summary: Gets or sets the imaginary part of the complex number.

Argument.summary: Gets the argument (phase) of the complex number in radians.

Modulus.summary: Gets the modulus (magnitude or absolute value) of the complex number as a double.

operator_sub.summary: Subtracts a complex number from another.

operator_div.summary: Divides a complex number by another.

operator_eq.summary: Determines whether two complex numbers are equal.
operator_eq.returns: true if the values are equal; otherwise, false.

operator_neq.summary: Determines whether two complex numbers are not equal.
operator_neq.returns: true if the values are not equal; otherwise, false.

implicit_double.summary: Implicitly converts a double to a complex number with a zero imaginary part.

implicit_decimal.summary: Implicitly converts a decimal to a complex number with a zero imaginary part.

FromImaginary_decimal.summary: Creates a pure imaginary complex number from a decimal.

FromImaginary_double.summary: Creates a pure imaginary complex number from a double.

Sqrt_double.summary: Computes the principal square root of a value, returning a complex number.
Sqrt_double.param: The value whose square root is to be found.
Sqrt_double.returns: The square root as a complex number.

Sqrt_decimal.summary: Computes the principal square root of a value, returning a complex number.
Sqrt_decimal.param: The value whose square root is to be found.
Sqrt_decimal.returns: The square root as a complex number.

Abs.summary: Computes the absolute value (modulus) of a complex number as a decimal.

explicit_double.summary: Explicitly converts a complex number to a double, dropping the imaginary part.
explicit_double.returns: The real part as a double.

explicit_decimal.summary: Explicitly converts a complex number to a decimal, dropping the imaginary part.
explicit_decimal.returns: The real part as a decimal.

implicit_decimal_tuple.summary: Implicitly converts a tuple of two decimals to a complex number.
implicit_decimal_tuple.param: The tuple containing the real and imaginary parts.

implicit_double_tuple.summary: Implicitly converts a tuple of two doubles to a complex number.
implicit_double_tuple.param: The tuple containing the real and imaginary parts.

Deconstruct_decimal.summary: Deconstructs the complex number into its real and imaginary decimal components.
Deconstruct_decimal.param: The output variable to store the real part.
The output variable to store the imaginary part.

Deconstruct_double.summary: Deconstructs the complex number into its real and imaginary double components.
Deconstruct_double.param: The output variable to store the real part.
The output variable to store the imaginary part.
